text: Key risks and uncertainties warrant explicit acknowledgment. Financial leverage remains significant at $130.9 billion total debt [CHUNK_ID: ace0e34a-b9b0-4e41-bbc3-236425f663db]. Operational scale presents execution risk, with the company employing 1.56 million full-time employees [CHUNK_ID: e65da658-2e8e-45cc-a6fc-d7c488c49e6a], introducing complexity in labor cost management across three segments. Regulatory scrutiny persists, as evidenced by Amazon's rebuttal to allegations regarding pricing practices amid trade policy developments [CHUNK_ID: 7ae84ac3-79a9-4c17-bd6f-36e1287d71f0]. Additionally, market sentiment has become more sensitive to earnings misses, with investors dumping stocks that don't meet profit forecasts more aggressively than usual [CHUNK_ID: 4a58a4c1-4682-4564-a49e-67118e9fb015].
